inputs.text:
Professional vector logo design for LexiVid.com.

Style: Premium SaaS, AI, modern startup branding, flat vector, SVG-ready, transparent background.

Icon concept:

* Start from the left with floating multilingual characters:

  * Latin: A, a, n
  * Chinese: 文, 字, 你
  * Korean: 한, 글
* The characters appear playful, dynamic, and lightweight.
* Characters gradually stretch and transform into elegant flowing strokes.
* The strokes smoothly morph into a stylized play button integrated with a filmstrip shape.
* The transition must feel organic and fluid, as if language is turning into video.
* No hard edges or abrupt transitions.
* Minimalist and memorable.
* Suitable as favicon and mobile app icon.

Color palette:

* Gradient from deep blue (#2563EB)
* Through violet (#7C3AED)
* To neon pink (#EC4899)

Typography:

* Text: "LexiVid.com"
* Modern rounded sans-serif.
* Clean, premium, technology-focused.
* Slightly bold.
* Gradient matching the icon.

Layout:

* Icon on top.
* LexiVid.com below.
* White or transparent background.
* High-end Silicon Valley AI startup aesthetic.

Keywords:
Text-to-Video AI, multilingual content generation, language transforms into video, smooth morphing, elegant motion, premium SaaS branding, vector logo, award-winning logo design.

Output:
Transparent PNG, SVG style, ultra clean vector, 4K resolution.
